---
title: "LRP53: ITT analysis of receptive vocabulary (R)"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

::: {.callout-warning title="Warning: Preliminary model output"}

This model output is preliminary and likely to change as the model evolves and further data are received.

:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

import arviz as az
import pandas as pd

_here = Path(".")
with open(_here / "config.json") as f:
    config = json.load(f)
trace = az.from_netcdf(_here / "trace.nc")
tau_summary = pd.read_csv(_here / "tau_summary.csv")
```

## Overview

LRP53 is the ITT analysis for receptive vocabulary (`rowpvt`). Structurally
identical to LRP52, with the outcome swapped to $R_{\text{post}}$ and the "own
baseline" becoming $R_{\text{pre}}$. The other seven measures enter as cross
baselines.

## Model

See the LRP52 report for the full specification. The differences here are:

- Outcome and "own" baseline swap to $R_{\text{post}}$ / $R_{\text{pre}}$.
- Trial count $N_R = 190$ (ROWPVT-4).

HSGPs on age and on the own baseline are disabled by default (same policy as
LRP52 — see `notes/202604181445-lrp52-gp-sensitivity.md`).

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

## Shared priors

![alpha](prior_alpha.svg){width=40%}
![tau](prior_tau.svg){width=40%}
![gamma_own](prior_gamma_own.svg){width=40%}
![gamma_cross](prior_gamma_cross.svg){width=40%}
![kappa](prior_kappa.svg){width=40%}

## Sampling diagnostics

```{python}
# | echo: false
diag = pd.read_csv(_here / "diagnostics.csv", index_col=0)
diag
```

![Trace](trace_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Energy](energy_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Pair plot](pair_plot.png){.lightbox}

![Posterior](posterior_plot.png){.lightbox}

## Posterior predictive check

![Posterior predictive](posterior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## Treatment-effect summary

```{python}
# | echo: false
tau_summary
```

The probability-scale marginal effect is evaluated at the sample mean of
$\text{logit}_*(R_{\text{pre}}, 190)$. Interpret $\tau$ as the ITT effect on
log-odds of the next-time ROWPVT score holding the full pre-score vector fixed.

## LOO-PSIS

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print("```\n" + open(_here / "loo.txt").read() + "\n```")
```

## Configuration

```{python}
# | echo: false
config
```
